title: Automate weekly review delivery
summary: Records release evidence for workspace-level weekly review delivery automation: review settings and manual dispatch in the dashboard, review settings and internal runner endpoints in the API, and the execution-board closeout for automated weekly review email delivery.
completed_todo_items: Automate weekly review email delivery with manual dispatch and an internal runner token

commands: npx playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard-product-paths.spec.ts --grep "weekly reviews workflow"

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms weekly review settings persistence, manual dispatch, and the internal review runner all resolve against the same digest and commercial review bundle.

commands: npx playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard-product-paths.spec.ts --grep "weekly reviews workflow"
smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the Reviews page builds cleanly, loads the new delivery settings, and can send the current workspace-wide bundle from the product-path harness.
Confirms the milestone closeout stays backed by release evidence.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the review automation endpoints and dashboard settings panel if scheduled delivery sends the wrong scope or recipient set in production.
